narrative:
Cols 79-B (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,393 registered voters, with 65.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 15.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.6%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.4 percentage points.
